name: Wireless earbuds with missing warranty
title: SoundPeak AirBass X2 Wireless Earbuds
intended_use_case: Daily music, online meetings, commuting, and student use.
description: Compact wireless earbuds positioned for daily listening and calls. The page claims clear microphone quality and long battery life, but does not yet show test proof.
target_audience: Students and young professionals who want affordable daily earbuds.
value_proposition: Daily wireless earbuds with practical call quality at a mid-range Türkiye price point.
warranty_or_return_policy: Warranty terms are planned but not yet written clearly on the page.
shipping_info: Ships across Türkiye; delivery time and shipping fee are not yet specified.
reviews_or_social_proof: Pre-launch product page with no public customer reviews yet.
image_notes: Needs close-up product images, in-ear scale photos, and a clear charging case image.

competitor_strengths: Battery life is stated more clearly
competitor_context.our_differentiator: Claimed better microphone and longer battery life

known_limitations: Microphone claim has no proof asset

name: Running shoes with size/fit risk
title: StrideLite Daily Run Shoes
intended_use_case: Short daily runs, walking, gym commutes, and weekend errands.
description: Lightweight road running shoes designed for daily use. The page mentions breathable comfort but needs more fit and material detail.
target_audience: Beginner runners and active commuters looking for one comfortable daily shoe.
value_proposition: A daily running shoe that balances breathable comfort and everyday styling.
shipping_info: Standard shipping is planned; fee and delivery time are not yet shown.
image_notes: Needs side, sole, on-foot, and size reference photos.

name: Coffee machine with premium price pressure
title: BrewNest MiniBarista 4 Coffee Machine
intended_use_case: Small kitchens, home office coffee breaks, and first-time espresso users.
description: A compact espresso machine for small kitchens. The page explains the space-saving design but needs clearer technical specifications and service details.
target_audience: Home coffee drinkers who want espresso without a large countertop machine.
value_proposition: A compact home espresso setup for small kitchens without premium machine pricing.
warranty_or_return_policy: 2-year limited warranty draft available; service process is not fully explained.
shipping_info: Free shipping is planned for launch week.
reviews_or_social_proof: No public customer reviews yet; internal product photos are available.
image_notes: Show countertop scale, water tank, portafilter, and cup clearance.

competitor_context.our_differentiator: Smaller footprint and easier home-office positioning

name: Handmade leather bag with authenticity concerns

description: A handmade tote bag made for laptop, notebook, and daily carry. The page highlights craftsmanship but needs dimensions and material proof.
target_audience: Urban professionals who prefer handmade accessories over mass-market bags.
value_proposition: Handmade daily carry with a refined work-friendly design.
warranty_or_return_policy: Returns accepted for unused items within 14 days.
shipping_info: Made to order; ships in 5-7 business days.
reviews_or_social_proof: No public reviews yet; workshop photos are available.
image_notes: Needs leather closeups, inside capacity photos, and laptop-fit image.

competitor_context.our_differentiator: Handmade finish and cleaner work-carry design

name: Web design service with vague scope

value_proposition: A launch-ready landing page without hiring a full design team.
warranty_or_return_policy: Includes one revision round; refund terms are not specified.
shipping_info: Digital delivery in 7 business days after brief approval.
reviews_or_social_proof: Portfolio examples are planned but not yet linked.
image_notes: Show before-after page examples and deliverable preview.

competitor_context.our_differentiator: Faster delivery and simpler founder-focused package

name: Overpriced pencil edge case
title: LineLux Mono One Pencil
description: A single graphite pencil presented as a premium desk object. The page uses lifestyle copy but gives almost no proof of material, origin, or durability.
value_proposition: A refined pencil for people who care about the feel of their desk tools.
image_notes: Only one dark mood image is planned.
known_limitations: Price is unusually high for a simple product
